base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bowser_boss_room — a tile from 1990 super mario world. Bowser's Castle final-boss room — Clown Car arena. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
